Waste Processing¶

WasteProcess maintains data relevant to the end-of-life pathways, including their Impacts and Emissions.

class pod_lca.eol.WasteProcess¶

Waste process a waste object is subjected to.

parent¶

Waste object for which the waste processing belong.

Type:

Waste Obj.

name¶

Name to identifying the waste process and parent.

Type:

str

process_name¶

Name of the process: e.g., 'Landfill', 'Recycle', 'Compost'.

Type:

str.

qty¶

Quantity of the parent object subjected to this process.

Type:

float.

unit¶

Unit of measurement.

Type:

Unit Obj.

life_cycle_stage¶

Life cycle stage of this process: e.g., 'C3', 'C4'.

Type:

str.

unit_impacts¶

Unit impacts of the process.

Type:

Impact Obj.

location¶

Location where the process occurs.

Type:

Location Obj.

transporation_link¶

Transportation of the waste object from parent's location to process location.

Type:

Link Obj.

linked_to¶

A follow up process. e.g, Recycle processing (C3) and Reuse (D).

Type:

WasteProcess Obj.

linked_from¶

A previous end-of-life process. e.g, Recycle processing (C3) and Reuse (D).

Type:

WasteProcess Obj.

classmethod new(parent, process_name, qty, unit, life_cycle_stage)¶

Create new waste process.

Parameters:

  • parent (Waste Obj.) -- Waste object for which the waste processing belong.

  • process_name (str.) -- Name of the process: e.g., 'Landfill', 'Recycle', 'Compost'.

  • qty (float.) -- Quantity of the parent object subjected to this process.

  • unit (Unit Obj.) -- Unit of measurement.

  • life_cycle_stage (str.) -- Life cycle stage of this process: e.g., 'C3', 'C4'.

set_parent(parent)¶

Set parent Waste object of the Waste Processing.

Parameters:

parent (Waste Obj.) -- Waste object for which the waste processing belong.

set_process_name(name)¶

Set the process name.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name of the process: e.g., 'Landfill', 'Recycle', 'Compost'

set_name(name=None)¶

Set name of the process identifying the parent and process.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name identifyer.

set_qty(qty)¶

Set quantity of the parent subjected to this waste process.

Parameters:

qty (float.) -- Quantity of the parent object subjected to this process.

set_unit(unit)¶

Set unit of measurement for the waste amount processed.

Parameters:

unit (Unit Obj.) -- Unit of measurement.

set_life_cycle_stage(life_cycle_stage)¶

Set life cycle stage of the product/process.

Parameters:

life_cycle_stage (str) -- Life cycle stage of the product/process.

set_unit_inventories()¶

Set unit impacts of the waste process.

set_location(location)¶

Set location of the waste process facility.

Parameters:

location (Location Obj.) -- Location of the waster process facility.

set_linked_process(process)¶

Set a linked process to the current process.

Parameters:

process (WasteProcess Obj.) -- Secondary process following the current process.

get_parent()¶

Get parent Waste object of the Waste Processing.

Returns:

Waste object for which the waste processing belong.

Return type:

Waste Obj.

get_process_name()¶

Get the process name.

Returns:

Name of the process: e.g., 'Landfill', 'Recycle', 'Compost'

Return type:

str

get_name()¶

Get name of the process identifying the parent and process.

Returns:

Name identifyer.

Return type:

str

get_qty()¶

Get quantity of the parent subjected to this waste process.

Returns:

Quantity of the parent object subjected to this process.

Return type:

float.

get_unit()¶

Get unit of measurement for the waste amount processed.

Returns:

Unit of measurement.

Return type:

Unit Obj.

get_life_cycle_stage()¶

Retrieve the life cycle stage corresponding to the waste process.

Returns:

Corresponding life cycle stage.

Return type:

str

get_unit_impacts()¶

Get unit impacts of the waste process.

Returns:

Unit impacts of the process.

Return type:

Impact Obj.

get_unit_emissions()¶

Get unit emissions of the waste process.

Returns:

Unit emissions of the process.

Return type:

Emission Obj.

get_linked_process(to=True)¶

Get the linked process to the current process.

Parameters:

to (bool) -- If True, return the process linked to, else linked from.

Returns:

Secondary process following the current process.

Return type:

WasteProcess Obj.
